title: 3D Bookshelves
description: Changes the texture of bookshelves to 3D
body:
# 3D Bookshelves
Make the Bookshelves and Chiseled Bookshelves look 3D without any performance imapct and any mod.

## Features:
- Vanilla like
- Enhance the visual
- Don't impact performance

## Try Other 3D Packs
1. [3D Rails](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rails-3d)
